_comment: Production Behavior Harness observability panels. Import into an existing Grafana dashboard (Dashboards → Import → paste JSON). Source: <hydra-project-path>/scripts/harness-metrics-exporter.py on port 9193 (node_primary). Prometheus job: harness-metrics.

panels.title: Harness — premature stop events (session)
panels.description: Session total of behavioral-compliance-gate violations (hesitation, half-measure, instruction-repeat). Tracks the §11.3 re-anchor + §14 DoD gap.

panels.title: Harness — destructive op rejections
panels.description: Lifetime count of destructive-action-gate blocks (rm -rf outside allowlist, git reset --hard, kubectl delete without manifest, poweroff without approval). Non-zero = harness caught an unauthorized destructive op.

panels.title: Harness — verification-missing warns
panels.description: DoD-gate warns: completion claim with no visible evidence (no test output / HTTP status / commit SHA / typecheck result). High = fake-green drift.

panels.title: Harness — plan approval gap
panels.description: Seconds since plan-phase transitioned to 'execute'. -1 = no active plan. Compare to session duration to spot 'work without plan' drift.

panels.title: Harness — advisory blocks by hook
panels.description: Work-cycle-gate and other advisory hooks that blocked a tool call. Use to spot: over-blocking (FPs) vs real policy catches.

panels.title: Harness — circuit breaker state
panels.description: Current state of the harness circuit breaker. 0=CLOSED (normal), 1=HALF_OPEN (FP threshold tripped, loosened for 1h), 2=OPEN (disabled for 1h).

panels.title: Harness — audit events by type
panels.description: Lifetime cumulative breakdown across event_type: allow / block / warn / state_transition / override. Healthy ratio: allow dominates; blocks + warns are rare.
